title: Sinc Reconstruction for LLM Prompts: Applying Nyquist-Shannon to the Specification Axis
narration: Sinc Reconstruction for LLM Prompts: Applying Nyquist-Sha.... I applied the Nyquist-Shannon sampling theorem to LLM prompt engineering. The core finding: a raw prompt is 1 sample of a 6-band specification signal, producing aliasing (hallucination, hedging, structural incoherence). Key results from 275 production observations: - CONSTRAINTS band carries 42.7% o. Follow @behikeai for daily AI news.
